Course Title: AI in Investment Analysis: Trust vs Verification
Category: Finance & Professional Services: Banking, Insurance, Accounting, Consulting, Legal, Real Estate
Who is this for: Investment analysts, portfolio managers, financial advisors, wealth managers, research analysts, investment consultants, fund managers, financial planners
Team or Dept this is for: Investment Management, Portfolio Management, Research, Wealth Management, Financial Advisory, Asset Management
Description: Risks of relying on AI for market insights and recommendations.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with financial markets and investment concepts, along with a general awareness of how AI tools are used in everyday professional settings, is all that is needed to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key risks associated with relying on AI-generated market insights and explain how to critically evaluate AI-driven investment recommendations. You will also apply practical verification strategies to assess the reliability of AI outputs, helping you make more informed and confident decisions within your professional investment analysis practice.
